name: dialog-data-exchange
description: AI 对话数据资产交易中心 MVP

scripts.prepare:web: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force www | Out-Null; Copy-Item index.html,styles.css,script.js,manifest.webmanifest,sw.js -Destination www -Force"
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync ios
